basics.label: Lead Backend Engineer
basics.name: Raúl Correia
basics.summary: Lead backend engineer with 7+ years in software engineering and 10+ years of professional experience. Experience leading delivery, shaping requirements, and improving observability and CI/CD across AWS-native backend services and APIs.

work.summary: Promoted to Lead Software Engineer in October 2024 to lead Asset Management backend services for Shell Recharge on AWS serverless infrastructure. || TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, API design, Datadog, CloudWatch
highlights: Led backend services that unified multiple internal Shell Recharge APIs behind a single entry point for other internal teams
Led a five-person team with two senior engineers, one junior engineer, and one contractor
Owned API design and technical direction from requirements through delivery
Partnered with product and stakeholders on roadmap, scope, and delivery
Helped define shared TypeScript and AWS service patterns used across teams
Improved monitoring and alerting with Datadog and CloudWatch
Coached engineers on serverless architecture, code quality, and delivery practices

work.summary: Backend engineer in the Business API / Bridge team, building integrations between Salesforce and Shell Recharge systems for charge point repair workflows. || TypeScript, AWS, DynamoDB, SST, Terraform, Datadog
highlights: Built the Work Orders Service connecting Salesforce with Shell Recharge systems to support charge point repair workflows and EV uptime
Maintained >99.9% uptime across multiple services, including Work Orders
Built TypeScript services with SST and Serverless Framework
Operated AWS services including DynamoDB, S3, and CloudWatch with Datadog monitoring
Delivered CI/CD in GitLab and infrastructure automation with Terraform and Docker
Reduced end-to-end pipeline time by 30% across multiple projects
Managed secrets and configuration with HashiCorp Vault

work.summary: Built backend services for a multi-tenant KYC/KYB platform in banking, covering configurable onboarding flows, vendor integrations, and platform reliability. || TypeScript, AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, AWS CDK v2, CloudWatch, X-Ray
highlights: Designed configurable onboarding workflows for multiple clients
Integrated KYC/KYB and fraud-check APIs from multiple vendors
Built serverless services on AWS Lambda and DynamoDB with TypeScript and Node.js
Migrated infrastructure from Serverless Framework to AWS CDK v2, enabling multi-customer deployments from one codebase
Built a declarative testing framework to capture customer workflows by tenant and deployment
Contributed to onboarding workflows that supported SOC 2 Type I certification
Improved observability with CloudWatch and X-Ray

work.summary: Built backend services and compute workflows for Ostate, a parametric building-generation platform.
highlights: Re-architected the platform to support new generation requirements and algorithms
Built backend services and generation algorithms in C#, C++, and Python
Built AWS and Docker-based compute pipelines for performance and scalability

work.summary: Contributed to modernization of the Uniface Web stack across the web layer and C++ backend.
highlights: Prototyped modern web technologies for Uniface Web
Implemented features across the low-code platform and C++ backend
Worked in a mixed Linux and Windows toolchain with GitLab CI and Jenkins

work.position: Junior Software Developer - Maia, Porto, Portugal
work.summary: Built next-generation MES product features for a manufacturing execution platform.
highlights: Built product features in C#/.NET, SQL Server, and Angular
Worked in a Scrum team from requirements discussions through feature demos
Built scripts and automation with PowerShell and Selenium for quality and tooling

work.summary: Built a .NET SDK for payment terminals during a software engineering internship.
highlights: Built communication layers for payment terminals over TCP, TLS/OpenSSL, and HTTP
Implemented multithreaded, event-driven processing for payment events
Added error handling and protocol support for reliable transactions

education.institution: Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto

awards.title: GameGune 2008 World Tournament (Counter-Strike 1.6)
awards.summary: Competed with Skilledamn! in Group B at the GameGune 2008 world tournament.

awards.title: Competitive gaming rankings
awards.summary: CS:GO Global Elite (top 0.1%), Valorant Immortal (top ~1%), Dota 2 Divine (top ~5%).

projects.name: Career Wrapped
projects.description: Built during VEED.IO's March 21-22, 2026 AMS GenAI & Video Hackathon: a tool that turns a public LinkedIn profile into a shareable career recap page and optional short MP4 using LLM-driven text generation and multimodal image/video pipelines, including Runware.ai.

projects.name: theme-browser.nvim
projects.description: Built an open source Neovim theme browser with registry-driven preview, install, apply, and persistence flows; added agent-based validation to reduce false positives in theme detection, and reached ~1.7k clones in the first day after launch.

projects.name: Movimento tech4COVID19 (Pro bono work)
projects.description: Built a pharmacy priority-queue module to support medicine ordering for COVID-positive elderly homes during the national emergency, collaborating on GDPR considerations and UI/UX clarity.

projects.name: Codecrafters HTTP Server in Go
projects.description: Developed an HTTP server from scratch in Go as part of the Codecrafters challenge, focusing on low-level networking and protocol implementation.

projects.name: Lambda Component Testing Framework
projects.description: Created a testing framework in TypeScript/Node.js for AWS Lambda functions, enabling direct testing of deployed Lambdas across teams.
